criteria.criterion: DBB-002: rm -r refuses to remove root /
DBB-003: rm without -r on directory returns error
DBB-005: readOnly blocks all write commands
DBB-007: cd to non-existent directory returns error
DBB-008: cd to a file returns Not a directory error
DBB-009: cd to valid directory updates cwd
DBB-010: mkdir creates directory natively (no .keep workaround)
DBB-012: mkdir without -p fails if parent missing
DBB-013: find -type f returns only files
DBB-014: find -type d returns only directories
DBB-015: find without -type returns all entries
